items.name: Celestica DS/ES Series
items.description: Celestica's DS and ES series white-box switches span 1G campus through 400G spine to 800G AI fabric, all SONiC-validated and listed in SandWork's compatibility matrix.

items.name: Dell PowerSwitch S/Z/N Series
items.description: Dell's PowerSwitch portfolio supports community and enterprise SONiC across 10G to 800G form factors, validated by Aviz, STORDIS, and PANTHEON.tech SandWork.

items.name: Edgecore Networks Switches
items.description: Edgecore provides a full line of open 1G-800G Ethernet switches supporting community SONiC, Enterprise SONiC, and SONiC Lite across data-center, campus, and service-provider use cases.

items.name: Micas Networks Open Switches
items.description: Micas produces white-box open switches from 1G access to 128x400G and 64x800G spine, all appearing on SandWork's validated hardware compatibility list.
